sa_mdcr_stus: Reason for Beneﬁciary Entitlement

SAS Format: $MCR

0 : MISSING

10: AGED WITHOUT ESRD

11: AGED WITH ESRD

20: DISABLED WITHOUT ESRD

21: DISABLED WITH ESRD

31: ESRD ONLY

sa_org_entlmt: Original Reason for Entitlement

SAS Format: $OEN

0: AGE

1: DISABILITY

2: ESRD

3: DISABILITY & ESRD

U: UNKNOWN
